历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 21100 → 29714 → 40321 → 37357 → 35803, showing an overall trend of first declining then rising; from 2021 to 2023, it significantly dropped by about 19200 places, while from 2024 to 2025, it rebounded for two consecutive years by about 4500 places, with a baseline of approximately 35803 in 2025; from 2021 to 2025, the planned enrollment numbers for Physics Category were 18, 32, 29, 30, 30 respectively, and in 2026 the plan is 34, an increase of about 13.3% compared to 2025, which helps alleviate competition. \ n211, Double First-Class construction university; on the Soft Science main ranking, it was approximately 63rd in 2026, with a stable upward trend in recent years (71st in 2021 → 63rd in 2026), ranking among the top in normal universities.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: During the 2024 reputation cycle, there was a negative incident regarding teacher ethics (an associate professor was reported for sexual harassment), which had some impact on the school's image; on Douyin, it ranked 15th overall (high heat), and in 2021 it gained high attention for handwritten admission letters, maintaining a relatively hot level of popularity in recent years; no obvious records of enrollment gaps; Chinese Language and Literature A-, Psychology A-, Education A-, with 3 disciplines at A- or above, showing outstanding disciplinary strength among normal universities, providing stable attraction for related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Shaanxi Normal University is located in Xi'an, Shaanxi Province, which is a cross-province application for Jiangsu candidates; the enrollment scale in Jiangsu is small (about 30 people), and local candidates' willingness to apply for normal universities across provinces is influenced by regional preferences, but the national recognition of ministry-affiliated normal universities can partially offset regional factors; majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering have high social heat and are highly recommended, which highly aligns with the Physics Category enrollment majors (Computer Science, Mathematics, Physics, etc.), driving application heat; normal/education major heat is divided and wait-and-see. In 2026, the total number of candidates for the Jiangsu Province general college entrance examination is about 521,000, a significant increase of about 45.7% compared to 2025 (about 357,675), with Physics Category candidates estimated at about 380,330 (based on the recent proportion of about 73%), leading to intensified competition; the provincial control line for Physics Category undergraduate batch in 2025 was 463 points, with a stable upward trend in recent years.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 35803, the alleviating effect of a 13.3% enrollment expansion in 2026, the intensified competition due to a 46% increase in Physics Category candidates in Jiangsu Province, and the driving effect of popular majors like Computer Science and Electronic Information on application heat, it is expected that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will slightly decline (harder to enter) compared to 2025; the predicted minimum ranking is about 38,717, with a range of 38,217 to 39,217.

If your ranking is significantly better than the upper limit of the range (<38,217), you can focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category has shifted from approximately 4596 → 4716 → 5381 → 5754 → 6031, with a continuous backward shift for five consecutive years, accumulating a total shift of about 1435 places; the 2025 baseline is approximately 6031, with an annual backward shift of about 250–300 places in the last three years, showing a clear trend of backward movement; the planned enrollment numbers for History Category from 2021 to 2025 were 21, 15, 19, 21, and 19 respectively, with a 2026 plan of 18, representing a reduction of about 5.3% compared to 2025, further intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 and Double First-Class construction university; ranked approximately 63rd in the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, with a stable or slightly rising position in recent years, placing it among the top normal universities; in 2024, a negative incident involving teacher ethics (an associate professor was reported for sexual harassment) occurred within the reputation cycle, impacting the university's image to some extent; ranked 15th overall on Douyin (high heat), maintaining a relatively hot level of popularity in recent years; no obvious records of admission gaps; three disciplines—Chinese Language and Literature A-, Psychology A-, and Education A-—have reached A- or above; among them, Chinese Language and Literature A- directly corresponds to the university's History Category enrollment major (Chinese Language and Literature Category), exerting a strong attraction for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Chinese Language/Chinese majors are socially popular and recommended; normal/education majors show divided popularity with a wait-and-see attitude; law majors are relatively hot but highly competitive. In 2026, the total number of regular college entrance exam takers in Jiangsu Province is approximately 521,000, a significant increase from 2025; the estimated number of History Category examinees is about 140,670 (based on a recent proportion of about 27%), an increase of about 45% compared to 97,088 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition; the provincial control line for the 2025 History Category undergraduate batch is 482 points, with a stable or rising trend in recent years; Shaanxi Normal University is located in Xi'an, Shaanxi Province, representing a cross-provincial application for Jiangsu examinees; the university's enrollment scale in Jiangsu for History Category is about 18–21 students, which is relatively small; the national recognition of a ministry-affiliated normal university can partially offset the regional preference impact of cross-provincial applications.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the trend of the History Category ranking shifting backward for five consecutive years, the intensifying effect of a reduction of about 5.3% in enrollment in 2026, the increased competition due to a significant increase of about 45% in History Category examinees in Jiangsu Province, and the pulling effect of the popularity of Chinese Language/Chinese majors, it is expected that the minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 will continue to shift backward (harder to enter) from the 2025 baseline of 6031; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 5871, with a range of 5371–6371.
